originalTitle: Oil prices tumble as deal to end Iran war appears close, though Trump says there’s no rush
summary: The U.S. appears close to reaching an agreement that would end the war with Iran and reopen the strategic Strait of Hormuz, according to reports Sunday, sending oil prices sharply lower.
content: The U.S. appears close to reaching an agreement that would end the war with Iran and reopen the strategic Strait of Hormuz, according to reports Sunday, sending oil prices sharply lower.
chineseTitle: 结束伊朗战争的协议似乎即将达成，油价暴跌，但特朗普表示不着急
chineseSummary: 据周日报道，美国似乎即将达成协议，结束与伊朗的战争并重新开放战略性的霍尔木兹海峡，导致油价大幅下跌。
chineseContent: 据周日报道，美国似乎即将达成协议，结束与伊朗的战争并重新开放战略性的霍尔木兹海峡，导致油价大幅下跌。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
